title: External Secrets Sync Errors
description: This monitor alerts when the External Secrets Operator encounters sync errors, indicating that secrets may not be synchronized correctly.

definition.name: [External Secrets] Sync Errors for {{name.name}} in {{namespace.name}}
definition.message:
External Secret `{{name.name}}` in namespace `{{namespace.name}}` is experiencing sync errors. This may indicate issues with the external provider or misconfiguration.

To resolve:
1. Check the ExternalSecret resource status: `kubectl describe externalsecret {{name.name}} -n {{namespace.name}}`
2. Verify the secret provider is accessible and credentials are valid
3. Check ESO controller logs for detailed error messages
